name: Lorynn 18" Wall Sconce (Set of 2) - SCN3000 - Off White/Gold - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with elegance using the Lorynn wall sconce set. Standing at 18 inches, each piece in this set of two offers a refined off white and gold design that complements any interior decor. Crafted from durable metal, these sconces add a touch of sophistication to your home. The subtle off white finish pairs beautifully with the gold accents, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere. Perfect for living rooms, hallways, or bedrooms, these sconces provide both style and function. Enhance your space with the Lorynn wall sconces and enjoy the harmonious blend of classic and modern design.
